# Support

## Getting Help

For usage questions and troubleshooting:
- Check the README first: https://github.com/kforth/python-cgm/blob/main/README.md
- Open a GitHub issue with environment details and reproduction steps.

## Bug Reports

When reporting bugs, include:
- python-cgm version
- Python version
- Operating system
- Commands run and traceback/log output
- Minimal CGM sample when possible

## Security Issues

Do not report security issues in public issues.
Use private reporting: https://github.com/kforth/python-cgm/security/advisories/new
